purpose: Archive UI and product interaction patterns from the OPML without promoting them into executable workflow contracts.

patterns.title: Color-Coded Multi-Solution Comparison
source_signals: 用字体颜色黑红黄蓝来区分方案一、方案二、方案三的每个步骤
用高亮表示该文本是相同的
patterns.why_archived: Display encoding and emphasis style are UI concerns, not ranking or default-selection semantics.
patterns.promotion_trigger: Only if a workflow contract truly depends on one specific display encoding for authority or review.

patterns.title: Variant Selection Buttons And Switching
source_signals: 底部有按钮选择按方案1、2、3执行
默认仅展示方案一与方案二，左右箭头可以切换1<>3
patterns.why_archived: Button layout and switching behavior are product controls layered on top of already-defined candidate semantics.
patterns.promotion_trigger: Only if workflow authority truly depends on one serialized selection control.

patterns.title: Selection And Extract-To-Draft Interaction
source_signals: 重按触发选取方案块，并且可以多选，多选后可提取到方案草稿中
点击该颜色文本后浮标选项出现提取到方案四
patterns.why_archived: Selection gesture and extraction UX should consume composition semantics, not define them.
patterns.promotion_trigger: Only if extraction becomes a workflow-stage artifact requirement rather than a product gesture.

patterns.title: Inline Editing And New Variant Creation
source_signals: 用户也可以直接编辑修改
直接编辑方案文本时，右上角出打勾符号，键盘编辑框显示，将选中的x步新建为方案4
patterns.why_archived: Inline edit UX does not own step identity, dependency repair, or coherence logic.
patterns.promotion_trigger: Only if the edit-confirm interaction itself becomes a required review gate.

patterns.title: Viewport Composition, Scroll, Keyboard, And Focus
source_signals: 多个 Text Viewport 拼在一个可滚动空间里
SwiftUI ScrollView 包含多个交互元素时，键盘、滚动、焦点不能按预期工作
patterns.why_archived: Viewport, focus, and scroll behavior are client interaction design, not workflow semantics.
patterns.promotion_trigger: Only if one viewport contract becomes necessary for review or serialization validity.

patterns.title: Client Implementation Choice
patterns.why_archived: Concrete client stacks and layout engines are product implementation choices rather than workflow contract surfaces.
patterns.promotion_trigger: Only if a future product architecture repository adopts them as implementation defaults.
